description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fedora Docker image and two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a libchaos:linux-gcc job that runs a before_script installing gcc, gcc-c++, cmake, make, openssl-devel, libpng-devel, libjpeg-devel, libwebp-devel via yum, then executes "mkdir build", "cd build", "cmake -D CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=\"Release\" ..", and "make", and publishes the files build/chaos/libchaos.a, build/chaos/libchaos.so, and build/tests/testchaos as artifacts, with the linux tag. In the test stage add a test:linux-gcc job that depends on libchaos:linux-gcc, runs a before_script installing libstdc++, openssl, libpng, libjpeg, libwebp via yum, sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, then runs "cd build/tests" and "./testchaos", also with the linux tag.
